meta.provider: Rails production.log (text with multi-line exception backtraces)
meta.incident: PostgreSQL hot-standby replica lag causes query cancellation: slow-query warnings -> PG::QueryCanceled StatementInvalid with backtraces -> order creation rollbacks and replica lag alarm fires, amid recurring Rack::Attack throttle distractor

ground_truth.desc: Rails AR queries exceeding 3s timeout before cancellation
PostgreSQL canceling statements due to hot-standby recovery conflict
Stack frame identifying the order create action
Orders rolling back due to query cancellation
Health check reporting database in degraded state
